title: Broad-spectrum Ebola vaccine
summary: Report describes a broad-spectrum vaccine candidate targeting Ebola, representing a significant advancement in preparedness for filovirus outbreaks. The news highlights progress toward pan-Ebola immunity, which could have transformative implications for global health security and outbreak response.

title: A framework for building a synthetic cell
summary: The SynCell Asia Initiative outlines a strategic framework for assembling living cells from scratch by addressing the long-standing bottleneck in orchestrating spatiotemporal integration of core functional modules. The approach leverages a centralized, AI-driven biofoundry to develop and test synthetic cell components systematically.

title: A genome-scale CRISPRi perturbation atlas of human induced pluripotent stem cells
summary: This Resource generates a transcriptional regulatory map of pluripotent stem cells using large-scale CRISPR screening, providing an invaluable reference for stem cell biology and gene therapy research. The atlas maps hundreds of regulatory interactions relevant to cellular reprogramming and therapeutic development.
